name: Seared Cervena Venison with Asian Pan Juice
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons mixed toasted black and white sesame seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the Cervena medallions in sesame seeds and set aside.
2. In a large skillet over high heat, heat olive oil. Sear medallions on each side, then transfer to an oven tray.
3. In the same skillet, sauté scallions and garlic for a few minutes.
4. Add chicken stock, oyster sauce, soy sauce, star anise, and cilantro. Simmer for about 6 minutes.
5. Strain the sauce into a bowl.
6. Return the skillet to high heat and fry leeks until crisp (about 5 minutes).
7. Finish cooking medallions in the oven at 400°F (200°C) for 5 minutes, resting meat for three minutes before serving.
8. Bring the sauce back to a boil, then whisk in butter. Spoon sauce over meat and top with fried leeks.
9. Yield: 4 servings
